ValidationRule.description: Closeout_Photos_Attached__c must be true before status can change to Pending Closeout Approval.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( Status = "Pending Closeout Approval", PRIORVALUE(Status) != "Pending Closeout Approval", NOT(Closeout_Photos_Attached__c) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Closeout photos must be attached before submitting for approval. Take and upload photos of the completed installation before changing status. Required: front of lot, plantings installed, any notable site conditions.
